arts.ttl: Daniel Farke addresses heated exchange with Blackburn Rovers player after Leeds United setback
arts.sum: Farke, who also spoke to the match officials after the Whites lost for the second time on the road this season, said: "I was frustrated. Leeds United manager Daniel Farke cut a frustrated figure in the wake of their 1-0 loss at Blackburn Rovers.

arts.ttl: What Blackburn Rovers boss John Eustace felt 'played into their hands' against Leeds United
arts.sum: John Eustace believes the Championship fixture schedule "played into their hands" after watching his Blackburn Rovers side dent Leeds United's title charge. However, the Whites failed to find a way past Rovers goalkeeper Aynsley Pears and Eustace's side held on to claim a third straight win.

arts.ttl: Championship: Leeds slip up at Blackburn as Hull’s woes go on at Boro
arts.sum: Tommy Conway strikes twice as Middlesbrough beat Hull Watford equal club-record unbeaten run in QPR impasse Todd Cantwell’s first-half penalty clinched Blackburn a 1-0 victory over Leeds at Ewood Park as Daniel Farke’s side missed out on the chance to return to the top of the Championship. Sheffield United’s defeat of Sunderland a day earlier meant Leeds came into this clash in second spot. And they fell short in their efforts to leapfrog the Blades after Cantwell’s 22nd-minute spot-kick secured Rovers’ third successive win and boosted their playoff challenge. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Here's how The Lancashire Telegraph scored the players' performances, with a six representing par for the course.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings with Aaronson and Piroe poor in Blackburn loss
arts.sum: Didn't have much influence on the game in attack and looked a little exposed in defence at times. Attacking marginally better, but never got that moment the team needed from him.

arts.ttl: Leeds miss out on return to top as Todd Cantwell’s penalty boosts Blackburn
arts.sum: United were aiming to return to the summit.

arts.ttl: Dancing Todd Cantwell dusts down Rangers celebration that landed him in hot water with Philippe Clement
arts.sum: He found the net for Blackburn from the penalty spot before turning to his 'dance' celebration

arts.ttl: ‘I can’t see…’: Leeds sent warning regarding the future of 26-year-old ace
arts.sum: Leeds United defender Max Wober has been linked with a move away from the Championship club in recent weeks. However, popular pundit David Norris has now warned the club against selling the player. Leeds are already lacking in depth in the defensive unit and selling Wober could prove to be a mistake. arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Blackburn Rovers as Daniel Farke makes two changes
arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ao Tanaka, Joe Rothwell; Daniel James, Brenden Aaronson, Wilfried Gnonto; Joel Piroe. Wilfried Gnonto and Daniel James traded starts earlier this week, while Solomon was given the full 90 minutes on Wednesday ahead of this expected rotation.
